list.name: post_id
list.query: SELECT id AS __value, LEFT(text, 100) || ' (' || TO_CHAR(timestamp, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || ')' AS __text FROM posts WHERE text IS NOT NULL AND text ILIKE '%${search}%' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 30
list.label: Post

targets.rawSql: SELECT text AS "Post Text", TO_CHAR(timestamp, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS "Date", variety AS "Type", ROUND(sentiment::numeric, 2) AS "Sentiment", energy AS "Energy", intent AS "Intent", permalink AS "Permalink" FROM posts WHERE id = '${post_id}'

SELECT CASE WHEN embedding IS NOT NULL THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS "Nomic V2 MOE (768d)", CASE WHEN embedding_minilm IS NOT NULL THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS "All-MiniLM (384d)", CASE WHEN embedding_bge_m3 IS NOT NULL THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS "BGE-M3 (1024d)", CASE WHEN embedding_qwen3 IS NOT NULL THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS "Qwen3 Embedding (1024d)", CASE WHEN embedding_arctic2 IS NOT NULL THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS "Arctic Embed 2 (1024d)" FROM posts WHERE id = '${post_id}'

panels.title: Nomic Embed Text V2 MOE  —  768 dimensions, general-purpose semantic

targets.rawSql: SELECT LEFT(p2.text, 150) AS "Post Text", TO_CHAR(p2.timestamp, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "Date", ROUND((1 - (p1.embedding <=> p2.embedding))::numeric, 4) AS "Similarity", ROUND(p2.sentiment::numeric, 2) AS "Sentiment", p2.energy AS "Energy", p2.intent AS "Intent" FROM posts p1, posts p2 WHERE p1.id = '${post_id}' AND p2.id != p1.id AND p2.embedding IS NOT NULL AND p1.embedding IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p1.embedding <=> p2.embedding LIMIT ${neighbors}

SELECT p2.energy AS "Energy", COUNT(*) AS "Count" FROM posts p1, posts p2 WHERE p1.id = '${post_id}' AND p2.id != p1.id AND p2.embedding IS NOT NULL AND p1.embedding IS NOT NULL AND p2.energy IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p1.embedding <=> p2.embedding LIMIT ${neighbors}

SELECT ROUND(AVG(sub.sentiment)::numeric, 3) AS "Avg Sentiment" FROM (SELECT p2.sentiment FROM posts p1, posts p2 WHERE p1.id = '${post_id}' AND p2.id != p1.id AND p2.embedding IS NOT NULL AND p1.embedding IS NOT NULL AND p2.sentiment IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p1.embedding <=> p2.embedding LIMIT ${neighbors}) sub

SELECT LEFT(p2.text, 150) AS "Post Text", TO_CHAR(p2.timestamp, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "Date", ROUND((1 - (p1.embedding_minilm <=> p2.embedding_minilm))::numeric, 4) AS "Similarity", ROUND(p2.sentiment::numeric, 2) AS "Sentiment", p2.energy AS "Energy", p2.intent AS "Intent" FROM posts p1, posts p2 WHERE p1.id = '${post_id}' AND p2.id != p1.id AND p2.embedding_minilm IS NOT NULL AND p1.embedding_minilm IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p1.embedding_minilm <=> p2.embedding_minilm LIMIT ${neighbors}

SELECT p2.energy AS "Energy", COUNT(*) AS "Count" FROM posts p1, posts p2 WHERE p1.id = '${post_id}' AND p2.id != p1.id AND p2.embedding_minilm IS NOT NULL AND p1.embedding_minilm IS NOT NULL AND p2.energy IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p1.embedding_minilm <=> p2.embedding_minilm LIMIT ${neighbors}

SELECT ROUND(AVG(sub.sentiment)::numeric, 3) AS "Avg Sentiment" FROM (SELECT p2.sentiment FROM posts p1, posts p2 WHERE p1.id = '${post_id}' AND p2.id != p1.id AND p2.embedding_minilm IS NOT NULL AND p1.embedding_minilm IS NOT NULL AND p2.sentiment IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p1.embedding_minilm <=> p2.embedding_minilm LIMIT ${neighbors}) sub

SELECT LEFT(p2.text, 150) AS "Post Text", TO_CHAR(p2.timestamp, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "Date", ROUND((1 - (p1.embedding_bge_m3 <=> p2.embedding_bge_m3))::numeric, 4) AS "Similarity", ROUND(p2.sentiment::numeric, 2) AS "Sentiment", p2.energy AS "Energy", p2.intent AS "Intent" FROM posts p1, posts p2 WHERE p1.id = '${post_id}' AND p2.id != p1.id AND p2.embedding_bge_m3 IS NOT NULL AND p1.embedding_bge_m3 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p1.embedding_bge_m3 <=> p2.embedding_bge_m3 LIMIT ${neighbors}

SELECT p2.energy AS "Energy", COUNT(*) AS "Count" FROM posts p1, posts p2 WHERE p1.id = '${post_id}' AND p2.id != p1.id AND p2.embedding_bge_m3 IS NOT NULL AND p1.embedding_bge_m3 IS NOT NULL AND p2.energy IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p1.embedding_bge_m3 <=> p2.embedding_bge_m3 LIMIT ${neighbors}

SELECT ROUND(AVG(sub.sentiment)::numeric, 3) AS "Avg Sentiment" FROM (SELECT p2.sentiment FROM posts p1, posts p2 WHERE p1.id = '${post_id}' AND p2.id != p1.id AND p2.embedding_bge_m3 IS NOT NULL AND p1.embedding_bge_m3 IS NOT NULL AND p2.sentiment IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p1.embedding_bge_m3 <=> p2.embedding_bge_m3 LIMIT ${neighbors}) sub

SELECT LEFT(p2.text, 150) AS "Post Text", TO_CHAR(p2.timestamp, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "Date", ROUND((1 - (p1.embedding_qwen3 <=> p2.embedding_qwen3))::numeric, 4) AS "Similarity", ROUND(p2.sentiment::numeric, 2) AS "Sentiment", p2.energy AS "Energy", p2.intent AS "Intent" FROM posts p1, posts p2 WHERE p1.id = '${post_id}' AND p2.id != p1.id AND p2.embedding_qwen3 IS NOT NULL AND p1.embedding_qwen3 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p1.embedding_qwen3 <=> p2.embedding_qwen3 LIMIT ${neighbors}

SELECT p2.energy AS "Energy", COUNT(*) AS "Count" FROM posts p1, posts p2 WHERE p1.id = '${post_id}' AND p2.id != p1.id AND p2.embedding_qwen3 IS NOT NULL AND p1.embedding_qwen3 IS NOT NULL AND p2.energy IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p1.embedding_qwen3 <=> p2.embedding_qwen3 LIMIT ${neighbors}

SELECT ROUND(AVG(sub.sentiment)::numeric, 3) AS "Avg Sentiment" FROM (SELECT p2.sentiment FROM posts p1, posts p2 WHERE p1.id = '${post_id}' AND p2.id != p1.id AND p2.embedding_qwen3 IS NOT NULL AND p1.embedding_qwen3 IS NOT NULL AND p2.sentiment IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p1.embedding_qwen3 <=> p2.embedding_qwen3 LIMIT ${neighbors}) sub

panels.title: Snowflake Arctic Embed 2  —  1024 dimensions, high-accuracy retrieval

targets.rawSql: SELECT LEFT(p2.text, 150) AS "Post Text", TO_CHAR(p2.timestamp, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "Date", ROUND((1 - (p1.embedding_arctic2 <=> p2.embedding_arctic2))::numeric, 4) AS "Similarity", ROUND(p2.sentiment::numeric, 2) AS "Sentiment", p2.energy AS "Energy", p2.intent AS "Intent" FROM posts p1, posts p2 WHERE p1.id = '${post_id}' AND p2.id != p1.id AND p2.embedding_arctic2 IS NOT NULL AND p1.embedding_arctic2 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p1.embedding_arctic2 <=> p2.embedding_arctic2 LIMIT ${neighbors}

SELECT p2.energy AS "Energy", COUNT(*) AS "Count" FROM posts p1, posts p2 WHERE p1.id = '${post_id}' AND p2.id != p1.id AND p2.embedding_arctic2 IS NOT NULL AND p1.embedding_arctic2 IS NOT NULL AND p2.energy IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p1.embedding_arctic2 <=> p2.embedding_arctic2 LIMIT ${neighbors}

SELECT ROUND(AVG(sub.sentiment)::numeric, 3) AS "Avg Sentiment" FROM (SELECT p2.sentiment FROM posts p1, posts p2 WHERE p1.id = '${post_id}' AND p2.id != p1.id AND p2.embedding_arctic2 IS NOT NULL AND p1.embedding_arctic2 IS NOT NULL AND p2.sentiment IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p1.embedding_arctic2 <=> p2.embedding_arctic2 LIMIT ${neighbors}) sub

panels.title: Cross-Model Agreement  —  How much do models agree on what's similar?
Neighbor Overlap — Shared posts across model top-N

targets.rawSql: WITH nomic AS (SELECT p2.id FROM posts p1, posts p2 WHERE p1.id = '${post_id}' AND p2.id != p1.id AND p1.embedding IS NOT NULL AND p2.embedding IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p1.embedding <=> p2.embedding LIMIT ${neighbors}), minilm AS (SELECT p2.id FROM posts p1, posts p2 WHERE p1.id = '${post_id}' AND p2.id != p1.id AND p1.embedding_minilm IS NOT NULL AND p2.embedding_minilm IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p1.embedding_minilm <=> p2.embedding_minilm LIMIT ${neighbors}), bge AS (SELECT p2.id FROM posts p1, posts p2 WHERE p1.id = '${post_id}' AND p2.id != p1.id AND p1.embedding_bge_m3 IS NOT NULL AND p2.embedding_bge_m3 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p1.embedding_bge_m3 <=> p2.embedding_bge_m3 LIMIT ${neighbors}), qwen AS (SELECT p2.id FROM posts p1, posts p2 WHERE p1.id = '${post_id}' AND p2.id != p1.id AND p1.embedding_qwen3 IS NOT NULL AND p2.embedding_qwen3 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p1.embedding_qwen3 <=> p2.embedding_qwen3 LIMIT ${neighbors}), arctic AS (SELECT p2.id FROM posts p1, posts p2 WHERE p1.id = '${post_id}' AND p2.id != p1.id AND p1.embedding_arctic2 IS NOT NULL AND p2.embedding_arctic2 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p1.embedding_arctic2 <=> p2.embedding_arctic2 LIMIT ${neighbors}) SELECT 'Nomic V2 vs MiniLM' AS "Model Pair", COUNT(*) AS "Shared Neighbors" FROM nomic n JOIN minilm m ON n.id = m.id UNION ALL SELECT 'Nomic V2 vs BGE-M3', COUNT(*) FROM nomic n JOIN bge b ON n.id = b.id UNION ALL SELECT 'Nomic V2 vs Qwen3', COUNT(*) FROM nomic n JOIN qwen q ON n.id = q.id UNION ALL SELECT 'Nomic V2 vs Arctic 2', COUNT(*) FROM nomic n JOIN arctic a ON n.id = a.id UNION ALL SELECT 'MiniLM vs BGE-M3', COUNT(*) FROM minilm m JOIN bge b ON m.id = b.id UNION ALL SELECT 'MiniLM vs Qwen3', COUNT(*) FROM minilm m JOIN qwen q ON m.id = q.id UNION ALL SELECT 'MiniLM vs Arctic 2', COUNT(*) FROM minilm m JOIN arctic a ON m.id = a.id UNION ALL SELECT 'BGE-M3 vs Qwen3', COUNT(*) FROM bge b JOIN qwen q ON b.id = q.id UNION ALL SELECT 'BGE-M3 vs Arctic 2', COUNT(*) FROM bge b JOIN arctic a ON b.id = a.id UNION ALL SELECT 'Qwen3 vs Arctic 2', COUNT(*) FROM qwen q JOIN arctic a ON q.id = a.id ORDER BY 2 DESC

panels.title: Universal Neighbors — Posts all 5 models agree on

targets.rawSql: WITH nomic AS (SELECT p2.id FROM posts p1, posts p2 WHERE p1.id = '${post_id}' AND p2.id != p1.id AND p1.embedding IS NOT NULL AND p2.embedding IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p1.embedding <=> p2.embedding LIMIT ${neighbors}), minilm AS (SELECT p2.id FROM posts p1, posts p2 WHERE p1.id = '${post_id}' AND p2.id != p1.id AND p1.embedding_minilm IS NOT NULL AND p2.embedding_minilm IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p1.embedding_minilm <=> p2.embedding_minilm LIMIT ${neighbors}), bge AS (SELECT p2.id FROM posts p1, posts p2 WHERE p1.id = '${post_id}' AND p2.id != p1.id AND p1.embedding_bge_m3 IS NOT NULL AND p2.embedding_bge_m3 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p1.embedding_bge_m3 <=> p2.embedding_bge_m3 LIMIT ${neighbors}), qwen AS (SELECT p2.id FROM posts p1, posts p2 WHERE p1.id = '${post_id}' AND p2.id != p1.id AND p1.embedding_qwen3 IS NOT NULL AND p2.embedding_qwen3 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p1.embedding_qwen3 <=> p2.embedding_qwen3 LIMIT ${neighbors}), arctic AS (SELECT p2.id FROM posts p1, posts p2 WHERE p1.id = '${post_id}' AND p2.id != p1.id AND p1.embedding_arctic2 IS NOT NULL AND p2.embedding_arctic2 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p1.embedding_arctic2 <=> p2.embedding_arctic2 LIMIT ${neighbors}) SELECT LEFT(p.text, 150) AS "Post Text", TO_CHAR(p.timestamp, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "Date", ROUND(p.sentiment::numeric, 2) AS "Sentiment", p.energy AS "Energy" FROM nomic n JOIN minilm m ON n.id = m.id JOIN bge b ON n.id = b.id JOIN qwen q ON n.id = q.id JOIN arctic a ON n.id = a.id JOIN posts p ON p.id = n.id

panels.title: Model Fingerprints  —  What each model uniquely surfaces
Unique to Nomic V2 MOE — posts only this model finds similar

targets.rawSql: WITH nomic AS (SELECT p2.id FROM posts p1, posts p2 WHERE p1.id = '${post_id}' AND p2.id != p1.id AND p1.embedding IS NOT NULL AND p2.embedding IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p1.embedding <=> p2.embedding LIMIT ${neighbors}), others AS (SELECT p2.id FROM posts p1, posts p2 WHERE p1.id = '${post_id}' AND p2.id != p1.id AND p1.embedding_minilm IS NOT NULL AND p2.embedding_minilm IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p1.embedding_minilm <=> p2.embedding_minilm LIMIT ${neighbors} UNION SELECT p2.id FROM posts p1, posts p2 WHERE p1.id = '${post_id}' AND p2.id != p1.id AND p1.embedding_bge_m3 IS NOT NULL AND p2.embedding_bge_m3 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p1.embedding_bge_m3 <=> p2.embedding_bge_m3 LIMIT ${neighbors} UNION SELECT p2.id FROM posts p1, posts p2 WHERE p1.id = '${post_id}' AND p2.id != p1.id AND p1.embedding_qwen3 IS NOT NULL AND p2.embedding_qwen3 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p1.embedding_qwen3 <=> p2.embedding_qwen3 LIMIT ${neighbors} UNION SELECT p2.id FROM posts p1, posts p2 WHERE p1.id = '${post_id}' AND p2.id != p1.id AND p1.embedding_arctic2 IS NOT NULL AND p2.embedding_arctic2 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p1.embedding_arctic2 <=> p2.embedding_arctic2 LIMIT ${neighbors}) SELECT LEFT(p.text, 150) AS "Post Text", TO_CHAR(p.timestamp, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "Date", p.energy AS "Energy" FROM nomic n LEFT JOIN others o ON n.id = o.id JOIN posts p ON p.id = n.id WHERE o.id IS NULL

panels.title: Unique to MiniLM — posts only this model finds similar

targets.rawSql: WITH minilm AS (SELECT p2.id FROM posts p1, posts p2 WHERE p1.id = '${post_id}' AND p2.id != p1.id AND p1.embedding_minilm IS NOT NULL AND p2.embedding_minilm IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p1.embedding_minilm <=> p2.embedding_minilm LIMIT ${neighbors}), others AS (SELECT p2.id FROM posts p1, posts p2 WHERE p1.id = '${post_id}' AND p2.id != p1.id AND p1.embedding IS NOT NULL AND p2.embedding IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p1.embedding <=> p2.embedding LIMIT ${neighbors} UNION SELECT p2.id FROM posts p1, posts p2 WHERE p1.id = '${post_id}' AND p2.id != p1.id AND p1.embedding_bge_m3 IS NOT NULL AND p2.embedding_bge_m3 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p1.embedding_bge_m3 <=> p2.embedding_bge_m3 LIMIT ${neighbors} UNION SELECT p2.id FROM posts p1, posts p2 WHERE p1.id = '${post_id}' AND p2.id != p1.id AND p1.embedding_qwen3 IS NOT NULL AND p2.embedding_qwen3 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p1.embedding_qwen3 <=> p2.embedding_qwen3 LIMIT ${neighbors} UNION SELECT p2.id FROM posts p1, posts p2 WHERE p1.id = '${post_id}' AND p2.id != p1.id AND p1.embedding_arctic2 IS NOT NULL AND p2.embedding_arctic2 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p1.embedding_arctic2 <=> p2.embedding_arctic2 LIMIT ${neighbors}) SELECT LEFT(p.text, 150) AS "Post Text", TO_CHAR(p.timestamp, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "Date", p.energy AS "Energy" FROM minilm m LEFT JOIN others o ON m.id = o.id JOIN posts p ON p.id = m.id WHERE o.id IS NULL

panels.title: Unique to BGE-M3 — posts only this model finds similar

targets.rawSql: WITH bge AS (SELECT p2.id FROM posts p1, posts p2 WHERE p1.id = '${post_id}' AND p2.id != p1.id AND p1.embedding_bge_m3 IS NOT NULL AND p2.embedding_bge_m3 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p1.embedding_bge_m3 <=> p2.embedding_bge_m3 LIMIT ${neighbors}), others AS (SELECT p2.id FROM posts p1, posts p2 WHERE p1.id = '${post_id}' AND p2.id != p1.id AND p1.embedding IS NOT NULL AND p2.embedding IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p1.embedding <=> p2.embedding LIMIT ${neighbors} UNION SELECT p2.id FROM posts p1, posts p2 WHERE p1.id = '${post_id}' AND p2.id != p1.id AND p1.embedding_minilm IS NOT NULL AND p2.embedding_minilm IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p1.embedding_minilm <=> p2.embedding_minilm LIMIT ${neighbors} UNION SELECT p2.id FROM posts p1, posts p2 WHERE p1.id = '${post_id}' AND p2.id != p1.id AND p1.embedding_qwen3 IS NOT NULL AND p2.embedding_qwen3 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p1.embedding_qwen3 <=> p2.embedding_qwen3 LIMIT ${neighbors} UNION SELECT p2.id FROM posts p1, posts p2 WHERE p1.id = '${post_id}' AND p2.id != p1.id AND p1.embedding_arctic2 IS NOT NULL AND p2.embedding_arctic2 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p1.embedding_arctic2 <=> p2.embedding_arctic2 LIMIT ${neighbors}) SELECT LEFT(p.text, 150) AS "Post Text", TO_CHAR(p.timestamp, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "Date", p.energy AS "Energy" FROM bge b LEFT JOIN others o ON b.id = o.id JOIN posts p ON p.id = b.id WHERE o.id IS NULL

panels.title: Unique to Qwen3 — posts only this model finds similar

targets.rawSql: WITH qwen AS (SELECT p2.id FROM posts p1, posts p2 WHERE p1.id = '${post_id}' AND p2.id != p1.id AND p1.embedding_qwen3 IS NOT NULL AND p2.embedding_qwen3 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p1.embedding_qwen3 <=> p2.embedding_qwen3 LIMIT ${neighbors}), others AS (SELECT p2.id FROM posts p1, posts p2 WHERE p1.id = '${post_id}' AND p2.id != p1.id AND p1.embedding IS NOT NULL AND p2.embedding IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p1.embedding <=> p2.embedding LIMIT ${neighbors} UNION SELECT p2.id FROM posts p1, posts p2 WHERE p1.id = '${post_id}' AND p2.id != p1.id AND p1.embedding_minilm IS NOT NULL AND p2.embedding_minilm IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p1.embedding_minilm <=> p2.embedding_minilm LIMIT ${neighbors} UNION SELECT p2.id FROM posts p1, posts p2 WHERE p1.id = '${post_id}' AND p2.id != p1.id AND p1.embedding_bge_m3 IS NOT NULL AND p2.embedding_bge_m3 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p1.embedding_bge_m3 <=> p2.embedding_bge_m3 LIMIT ${neighbors} UNION SELECT p2.id FROM posts p1, posts p2 WHERE p1.id = '${post_id}' AND p2.id != p1.id AND p1.embedding_arctic2 IS NOT NULL AND p2.embedding_arctic2 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p1.embedding_arctic2 <=> p2.embedding_arctic2 LIMIT ${neighbors}) SELECT LEFT(p.text, 150) AS "Post Text", TO_CHAR(p.timestamp, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "Date", p.energy AS "Energy" FROM qwen q LEFT JOIN others o ON q.id = o.id JOIN posts p ON p.id = q.id WHERE o.id IS NULL

panels.title: Unique to Arctic 2 — posts only this model finds similar

targets.rawSql: WITH arctic AS (SELECT p2.id FROM posts p1, posts p2 WHERE p1.id = '${post_id}' AND p2.id != p1.id AND p1.embedding_arctic2 IS NOT NULL AND p2.embedding_arctic2 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p1.embedding_arctic2 <=> p2.embedding_arctic2 LIMIT ${neighbors}), others AS (SELECT p2.id FROM posts p1, posts p2 WHERE p1.id = '${post_id}' AND p2.id != p1.id AND p1.embedding IS NOT NULL AND p2.embedding IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p1.embedding <=> p2.embedding LIMIT ${neighbors} UNION SELECT p2.id FROM posts p1, posts p2 WHERE p1.id = '${post_id}' AND p2.id != p1.id AND p1.embedding_minilm IS NOT NULL AND p2.embedding_minilm IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p1.embedding_minilm <=> p2.embedding_minilm LIMIT ${neighbors} UNION SELECT p2.id FROM posts p1, posts p2 WHERE p1.id = '${post_id}' AND p2.id != p1.id AND p1.embedding_bge_m3 IS NOT NULL AND p2.embedding_bge_m3 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p1.embedding_bge_m3 <=> p2.embedding_bge_m3 LIMIT ${neighbors} UNION SELECT p2.id FROM posts p1, posts p2 WHERE p1.id = '${post_id}' AND p2.id != p1.id AND p1.embedding_qwen3 IS NOT NULL AND p2.embedding_qwen3 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p1.embedding_qwen3 <=> p2.embedding_qwen3 LIMIT ${neighbors}) SELECT LEFT(p.text, 150) AS "Post Text", TO_CHAR(p.timestamp, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "Date", p.energy AS "Energy" FROM arctic a LEFT JOIN others o ON a.id = o.id JOIN posts p ON p.id = a.id WHERE o.id IS NULL
